---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition to the template
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**

What are you trying to do that the template makes hard today?

**Proposed solution**

What you'd like to see. Note if it fits v1 or belongs on the v1.1 roadmap
(desktop, real licensing providers, runtime plugins).

**Alternatives considered**

Anything you've already tried or ruled out.
